_description: [Your Company] Plugin & MCP Server Catalog. Edit this file to add/remove available tools for the team.
_announcement_convention: Add 'announcement_id': '{key}-v1' to any NEW entry you want announced to users at next session start. Existing entries without this field are never announced (assumed already known). Bump to '-v2' to re-announce after major changes.

Navigate to API Keys and copy your key

Select your project > Settings > API

salesforce-dx.name: Salesforce DX
salesforce-dx.description: Salesforce org management, metadata, data queries, Apex tests

keyDescriptions.SF_TARGET_ORG: Salesforce org username (e.g. [admin@your-domain.com]). Run: sf org login web

setupInstructions: Install Salesforce CLI: npm install -g @salesforce/cli
Authenticate: sf org login web
Verify: sf org list — copy your org username (e.g. your.email@[your-domain.com])
The setup script will ask for your org username

[your-kb-server].description: Search and manage [your-docs-site.com] knowledge base articles

Include your name and role
You'll receive the KB_PLATFORM_API_KEY via secure channel
Paste it when the setup script or catalog.sh prompts you

ms365.name: Microsoft 365
ms365.description: Outlook email/calendar search, SharePoint, Teams messages

keyDescriptions.MS365_MCP_CLIENT_ID: Azure Portal > App Registrations > '[Your Company] MCP'. Ask: [Admin 1], [Admin 2]
keyDescriptions.MS365_MCP_TENANT_ID: Azure Portal > App Registrations > '[Your Company] MCP'. Ask: [Admin 1], [Admin 2]
keyDescriptions.MS365_MCP_CLIENT_SECRET: Azure Portal > App Registrations > Certificates. Ask: Ray

setupInstructions: Need help? Message the AI Launchpad channel in Teams, or email [admin-email@your-domain.com]
Include your name and role
You'll receive MS365_MCP_CLIENT_ID, MS365_MCP_TENANT_ID, and MS365_MCP_CLIENT_SECRET
Paste each when the setup script or catalog.sh prompts you

roi._note: User portion only (email/cal/Teams). Admin portion (SharePoint/OneDrive, 2 mgrs @ $40.87) tracked separately — pending Issue #7 catalog split.

github.name: GitHub
github.description: Repository management, issues, PRs, branch protection, Actions, and GitHub Projects — without dropping to gh CLI

keyDescriptions.GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN: github.com/settings/tokens — Classic token. Required scopes: repo, read:org, project

setupInstructions: Go to https://github.com/settings/tokens
Click 'Generate new token (classic)'
Set expiration (recommend 1 year)
Check these scopes: repo (full), read:org, project
Copy the token — it won't be shown again
Paste it when prompted for GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN
promptExamples: Create a GitHub issue for [description] and label it blueprint
Close issue #5 and add a comment with what was done
Check the status of our latest GitHub Actions run

cognitoforms.name: Cognito Forms
cognitoforms.description: Form submissions and data via Cognito Forms API

keyDescriptions.COGNITO_FORMS_API_KEY: Cognito Forms > Organization > Integrations > API Key. Ask: Ray

setupInstructions: Need help? Message the AI Launchpad channel in Teams, or email [admin-email@your-domain.com]
Include your name and role
You'll receive the COGNITO_FORMS_API_KEY via secure channel

n8n.name: n8n Workflows
n8n.description: Build, list, execute, and debug n8n workflows without leaving Claude — list workflows, get node configs, trigger executions, and inspect run history
args: set -a; [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a; exec npx -y n8n-mcp

keyDescriptions.N8N_API_KEY: n8n Cloud > Settings > API > Create API Key. Ask: [Admin 1], [Admin 2]

setupInstructions: 1. Log in to https://[your-n8n-instance.app.n8n.cloud]
2. Click your avatar (bottom-right) > Settings > API
3. Click 'Create API Key', name it (e.g. Claude Code), copy the key
4. Paste it when prompted for N8N_API_KEY
Need help? Message the AI Launchpad channel in Teams, or email [admin-email@your-domain.com]
promptExamples: Show me the nodes in the Channel Partner Application Processor workflow
Execute the Calendly Lead Activity Logger workflow
Get the last 5 executions of the CSAT workflow and show any errors

pal.name: PAL (Multi-model)
pal.description: Route prompts to Gemini, OpenAI, or OpenRouter models
setupInstructions: Need help? Message the AI Launchpad channel in Teams, or email [admin-email@your-domain.com]
Include your name, role, and which models you need (Gemini, OpenAI, OpenRouter)
You'll receive the requested keys via secure channel
All keys are optional — PAL works with any one of them

yealink.name: Yealink YMCS & RPS
yealink.description: Yealink device management (YMCS) and remote provisioning (RPS) — list/reboot/add/remove devices, manage sites and enterprises, register MAC addresses to provisioning URLs

keyDescriptions.YMCS_CLIENT_ID: YMCS portal > Enterprise > Open API > Client Credentials. Ask: Ray
keyDescriptions.YMCS_CLIENT_SECRET: YMCS portal > Enterprise > Open API > Client Credentials. Ask: Ray

setupInstructions: ── YMCS (Device Management) ──
1. Log in to YMCS at https://dm.yealink.com
2. Go to System > Integration > API
3. Click 'Edit' to generate or retrieve your Client ID and Client Secret
NOTE: Only one set of credentials exists per enterprise — regenerating invalidates the old ones
── RPS (Remote Provisioning) ──
4. RPS accounts are issued by Yealink — you cannot self-register
5. Contact your Yealink distributor and ask them to create a VAR/reseller RPS account
OR email rps@yealink.com directly to apply
6. Once approved, log in at https://rps.yealink.com with the issued username and password
── Add to your MCP config ──
7. Set YMCS_CLIENT_ID and YMCS_CLIENT_SECRET from step 3
8. Set RPS_USERNAME and RPS_PASSWORD from step 6

clickup.name: ClickUp
clickup.description: Project management — tasks, spaces, lists, comments, time tracking

keyDescriptions.CLICKUP_API_TOKEN: ClickUp personal API token. See setupInstructions.

setupInstructions: Go to https://app.clickup.com
Click your avatar (bottom-left) > Settings
Navigate to Apps > API Token
Click 'Generate' or copy your existing personal token
If you need workspace access, ask your manager
Token format: pk_XXXXXXXX_XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX
